nodes.name: openai-provider.ts
nodes.summary: Default NarrationProvider implementation that calls OpenAI's audio/speech REST endpoint to synthesize TTS narration audio from text, requiring only an API key and no extra client SDK.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a plain fetch() call with response.ok/status checks and Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer()) rather than a vendor SDK, keeping the provider dependency-free.

nodes.name: provider.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the NarrationProvider interface — the single contract TTS providers must implement to plug into synthesizeNarration(), keeping provider swaps isolated from script-building and studio audio playback.

nodes.name: script.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest suite for buildNarrationScript that verifies it emits one line per hook/round/verdict, mentions both contenders and names the round winner, keeps timeline anchors strictly increasing, and preserves the verdict tagline verbatim.

nodes.name: script.ts
nodes.summary: Turns a frozen, category-agnostic VideoInput into timestamped narration lines (hook, one per round, verdict) by anchoring each line to scene and round timeline boundaries computed by the shared package.
nodes.languageNotes: Accepts only Pick<VideoInput, 'meta'|'contenders'|'rounds'|'verdict'> so the function stays pure and never needs category-specific knowledge (CLAUDE.md prime directive #1).

nodes.name: synthesize.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates end-to-end narration synthesis: builds the script, invokes the injected TTS provider per line, writes mp3 files to disk, probes real audio duration via music-metadata, and returns NarrationClip[] ready to attach to a VideoInput.
nodes.languageNotes: Probes real mp3 duration with music-metadata's parseBuffer rather than trusting the provider or a word-count estimate, since AudioTrack's ducking window depends on accurate durationSec.

nodes.name: OpenAiTtsProvider
nodes.summary: Concrete NarrationProvider backed by OpenAI's /v1/audio/speech endpoint; reads the API key from options or OPENAI_API_KEY, posts text with configurable model/voice, and returns the resulting mp3 as a Buffer.

nodes.name: buildNarrationScript
nodes.summary: Computes narration lines with absolute timeline anchors (hook, per-round, verdict) from a VideoInput's meta/contenders/rounds/verdict, using shared scene- and round-time-range helpers so it stays category-agnostic.

nodes.name: synthesizeNarration
nodes.summary: Async pipeline that scripts, synthesizes via an injected NarrationProvider, saves one mp3 per narration line, probes real audio duration, and returns NarrationClip[] for attaching to a VideoInput.
